creator: dburr@POBoxes.com
text:
Please delete (close) this PR.

Xmame 0.29.2 has gone out of beta stage (i.e. it is now a release
version).  This weekend (if time permits -- school is ending soon!) I
will be updating the xmame port to track the new version.  xmame_beta is
no longer needed (nor should be used). :)

Thanks.
--
